report.summary: Built two comprehensive learn guides: Flash Loans Guide 2026 (939 lines, covering Aave/dYdX/Uniswap flash loans, use cases, exploits, and developer walkthrough) and DeFi Vaults & Structured Products Guide 2026 (693 lines, covering Morpho, Yearn, Pendle, Kamino vault types, institutional adoption, and risk frameworks). Both pages added to PUBLISHED_PAGES.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Flash Loans: Uncollateralized instant DeFi loans requiring same-transaction repayment. Invented by Aave in 2020. Major protocols: Aave V3 ($30B+ liquidity), Uniswap V4 flash swaps, dYdX, Balancer (0% fee). Primary use cases: arbitrage, collateral swaps, self-liquidation, yield optimization. Over $200M lost to flash loan exploits historically (bZx, Cream, Euler).

DeFi Vaults & Structured Products: $12B+ category in 2026. Market leaders: Morpho curated vaults ($5.8B TVL), Pendle yield tokenization ($3.5B TVL), Kamino on Solana ($2.36B TVL), Yearn ($600M+). Institutional adoption accelerating — Kraken DeFi Earn routing CEX deposits to on-chain vaults. 2026 is the year vaults matured from niche DeFi to institutional-grade infrastructure.

sections.title: Content Created
items: Flash Loans Guide 2026 — 8 content sections (~2,600 words): What are flash loans, how they work (5-step flow), major protocols comparison, top use cases, risks & exploits, developer execution guide, flash loans vs traditional lending comparison, 6-question FAQ

DeFi Vaults & Structured Products Guide 2026 — 8 content sections (~2,600 words): What are DeFi vaults, how they work, 6 vault types (yield aggregators, curated lending, yield tokenization, options/DOVs, liquidity vaults, delta-neutral), top protocols, institutional adoption, risks, selection framework, 6-question FAQ

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Flash Loans: Title 'Flash Loans Guide 2026 — How DeFi Instant Loans Work | degen0x', target keywords: flash loans, aave flash loans, defi flash loans. Article + FAQ schemas. 6 FAQ entries targeting People Also Ask.

DeFi Vaults: Title 'DeFi Vaults Guide 2026 — Structured Products & Yield Strategies | degen0x', target keywords: defi vaults, defi structured products, morpho vaults, pendle yield. Article + FAQ schemas. 6 FAQ entries.
Both pages include OpenGraph article metadata, Twitter cards, structured data (ArticleSchema + FAQSchema combined), Breadcrumb navigation, and 5+ internal links to related degen0x pages.
